zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Jenkin Hanmer於大約1350年出生在威爾士福林爾韓麥時，他的父親Sir David Hanmer23歲，母親Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu19歲。他於1393年與Efa verch Iorwerth在英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾威爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1427年享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Jenkin Hanmer于大约1350年出生在威尔士福林爾韓麥时，他的父亲Sir David Hanmer23岁，母亲Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu19岁。他于1393年与Efa verch Iorwerth在英国英格兰素斯 越可爾威爾斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1427年享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hanmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: habitational name from Hanmer (Flintshire), named with the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English mere ‘lake, pond’. A daughter of Sir David Hanmer, a Welsh judge in the 14th century, was married to the Welsh ruler Owen Glendower, who led the revolt against Henry IV's rule in Wales.
English: habitational name from Anmer (Norfolk), from Old English æned ‘duck’ + mere ‘lake, pond’.

nameMeanings.name: Jenkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Jankin. This was a pet form of the boy's name Jan , with the diminutive suffix -kin. The modern given name is popular in Wales, where the surnames Jenkin and Jenkins are common.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Jenkin Hanmer was born about 1350, in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, his father, Sir David Hanmer, was 23 and his mother, Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu, was 19. He married Efa verch Iorwerth in 1393, in Wales, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1427, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Jenkin Hanmer est né environ 1350, à Hanmer, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Sir David Hanmer, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Efa verch Iorwerth en 1393, à Wales, South Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1427, à l’âge de 79 ans.

Er hat 1393 in Wales, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Efa verch Iorwerth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1427 im Alter von 79 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Jenkin Hanmerが約1350年にウェールズフリントシュアイアハンマーで生まれた時，父Sir David Hanmerは23歳，母Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Dduは19歳であった。1393年にイギリスイギリスソウス ヨークシュアイアワレスでEfa verch Iorwerthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1427年に79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Jenkin Hanmer(이)가 대략 1350년 웨일스 플린츠히르 핸머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir David Hanmer(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 월스에서 Efa verch Iorwerth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1427년 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Jenkin Hanmer родился около 1350 г. в местности ханмир, флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir David Hanmer было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Efa verch Iorwerth в 1393 г. в местности веилесь, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1427 г. в возрасте 79 лет.
